overall.description: A stationary first-person view from a high-end cyberpunk apartment bedroom in Cyberpunk 2077, featuring a panoramic sunset view through slatted blinds while a television cycles through various broadcasts. The scene maintains a warm, ambient atmosphere with mixed natural and artificial lighting throughout the duration.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk apartment bedroom with panoramic sunset view

events.description: television screen glitches to display red 'HATE' text propaganda
television switches to bright animated cartoon broadcast with blue background
television changes to news broadcast showing human news anchor

agents.ego_description: stationary in bed, watching television and the sunset view through the window

entered.detail: curved ceiling with parallel wooden slats and recessed lighting
large window with horizontal blinds showing orange sunset clouds and cityscape
unmade bed with white sheets and pillows
open magazine or book lying on the bed
flatscreen TV displaying various glitchy broadcasts and images
pink neon sign with cursive text on the dark wall

segments.scene_description: A static view of a futuristic bedroom interior during sunset. The camera remains fixed on the bed and panoramic window while a television on the right cycles through various broadcasts including propaganda text, animated shows, and news programs. Warm orange light filters through the blinds, illuminating the wooden slat ceiling and modern furnishings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static first-person perspective within a futuristic bedroom as the ambient light and digital displays shift during a cyberpunk sunset. It begins with a fixed view of the bed and a panoramic window, where warm orange light filters through slatted blinds to illuminate the wooden ceiling and modern furnishings. As the scene persists, the focus remains on the interplay between the natural glow of the horizon and the artificial flicker of a television on the right. This screen continuously cycles through a variety of broadcasts, transitioning from propaganda text to animated shows and news programs. The atmosphere remains steady, blending the serene sunset hues with the restless energy of the city's digital transmissions.
